categories.label: Tile Victory Points
categories.description: Points printed on upgraded (flipped) village tiles

categories.label: Winter Scoring Tiles
categories.description: Points from winter tiles (Apothecary, Craftsman's Guild, Jeweller, Key Guild, Keythedral, Key Market, Mercer's Guild, Scholar, Scribes, Village Hall, Watermill, Windmill)

categories.label: Boat Tile Points
categories.description: Points from boat tiles (Keyflower, Sea Bastion, Sea Breese, Flipper, Ianvincible, White Wind)

categories.label: Turn Order Tile Points
categories.description: 1 point per adjacent tile for each turn order tile in your village

categories.label: Gold Counters
categories.description: 1 point per gold counter not allocated to a scoring tile

categories.label: Resource Storage Tiles
categories.description: Points from Barn, Blacksmith, Stone Yard, and Timber Yard for stored resources
